ques: Locate a one-way flight from Johannesburg to Toronto on July 30, 2026, for one adult, and analyze the price trends for the following month.
answer: One-way Johannesburg→Toronto on Jul 30, 2026 (1 adult) starts at €724 (prices "typical"). For the following month (August), the price graph shows a flat trend holding roughly €650–€800 (e.g. Aug 19 ≈ €771, Aug 22 ≈ €761), slightly higher than the Jul 30 fare with no notable dips; the cheapest dates in the broader window fall in mid-September (~€575) and the most expensive in early September (~€920).
